prompt:
Goal: Create a high-fashion editorial contact sheet collage featuring a slim East Asian woman with straight shoulder-length black hair modeling a minimalist black satin sleeveless dress, with every face intentionally obscured by a soft beige rectangular blur for anonymity.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 collage, approximately 1200×675 px, warm off-white studio background, clean magazine look, no borders between panels, soft natural studio lighting, muted cream and black palette.

Layout: Build exactly 9 visible photo panels arranged as an asymmetrical fashion lookbook grid. The center panel is the largest, a close-up portrait from chest to head, showing glossy black hair, a black sleeveless satin neckline, silver chain necklace, silver hoop earrings, and one hand across the collarbone wearing stacked silver rings. Around it place 8 smaller editorial shots: 1 full-body standing front pose with hands on hips at far left; 1 seated side pose on a white bench with crossed legs and black pointed heels in the upper left; 1 seated pose on a white bench with legs crossed and hand near chin in the lower left; 1 full-length standing pose in the lower middle-left; 1 upper-body pose leaning on a white block with one hand near the neck in the upper right; 1 dynamic standing pose with hair flipped outward in the upper far right; 1 side-profile bust portrait in the lower right-center; 1 standing three-quarter pose with one hand on hip in the lower far right.

Subject details: The model wears a black satin sleeveless midi-to-maxi dress with a simple round neckline and subtle drape, chunky silver chain necklace, silver hoop earrings, and multiple silver rings, and black pointed high heels in seated/full-body shots. Hair is sleek, glossy, dark, center-parted or slightly side-parted, shoulder length with occasional motion in two panels. Poses are elegant, poised, fashion catalog style.

Visual style: Photorealistic luxury fashion editorial, studio lookbook contact sheet, soft shadows, creamy beige background, refined styling, crisp fabric sheen, high-end magazine composition, minimal props limited to a white bench and white block.

Constraints: Use exactly 9 panels and exactly 9 obscured faces, each face covered by a rectangular blurred beige block matching skin tones. Do not show readable text, logos, watermark, extra people, colorful background, or additional accessories beyond the listed jewelry and shoes.
